title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese outlines Alex Hormozi's 4-pillar system for using AI in business operations: data as a moat, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compound effects. The video highlights a critical team mistake that required executive intervention and offers practical application guidance for builders.
